name: bugscope
description: Bugscope skills — runtime debugging and browser recording for AI agents.

skills.name: bugscope-mcp
skills.description: Bugscope MCP tool reference. Load before invoking any mcp__bugscope__* tool. Covers debug_*, chrome_*, and session_* namespaces with per-language references for Python, Node.js, Go, and Chrome.

skills.name: bugscope-cli
skills.description: Bugscope CLI reference. Load when invoking the bugscope CLI binary. Covers all debug and browser subcommands, breakpoint syntax, output modes, and per-language setup.
